input.raw_description: We are looking for a Senior Data Engineer with 6+ years of experience to join our Berlin office. Experience with cloud platforms (AWS or GCP) is a plus.

notes: 6+ years explicitly stated, hybrid explicitly stated, skills list is concrete

input.raw_description: Join our London engineering team as a Junior Software Engineer. You'll be working on our core API services using Python and FastAPI. This is an onsite role at our Shoreditch office. 0–2 years of experience required. Skills: Python, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Docker, Git.

input.raw_description: 100% remote position open to candidates worldwide. We are hiring a mid-level Backend Developer with 3–5 years of experience. You will build and maintain REST APIs and microservices. Stack: Go, gRPC, PostgreSQL, Redis, Kubernetes. Flexible hours, async-first team.

input.raw_description: We are hiring a DevOps Engineer for our Dublin office. This is a full-time onsite role. Candidates should have 3–4 years of experience with CI/CD pipelines, cloud infrastructure, and container orchestration. Skills required: Terraform, Ansible, Jenkins, AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, Bash, Prometheus, Grafana.

input.raw_description: We are seeking a Vice President of Engineering to lead our 80-person engineering organisation at our San Francisco headquarters. The role is fully onsite. You will set technical strategy, manage engineering directors, and own the product delivery roadmap. 15+ years of engineering experience required, including 5+ years in senior leadership. Deep knowledge of distributed systems and cloud architecture expected.

notes: VP = executive seniority, onsite HQ, skills are architecture-level not tooling

Familiarity with Python, pandas, and scikit-learn expected.

Fully remote, open to candidates in Europe or North America. We need a Senior Product Manager to own our growth product area. 7+ years of product management experience required, with a track record in B2B SaaS. You will define roadmaps, run discovery, and work cross-functionally with engineering and design. Tools: Jira, Figma, Amplitude, SQL.

input.raw_description: Join our product team in Toronto as a Lead Frontend Engineer. This is a hybrid role (2 days in office per week). Skills: TypeScript, React, Next.js, GraphQL, Webpack, Jest, Cypress, Storybook.
